Spatial Cueing Task

This task has <TRIALS> trials. At the beginning of each trial, a fixation cross will appear with an arrow cue:

  [< +  ] -- left arrow
  [  + >] -- right arrow
  [< + >] -- both arrows (neutral)

The stimulus X will appear shortly after, either to the left or right of the fixation. The arrow correctly predicts the location <PERCENT>% of the time.

Your goal is to keep your eyes on the + and respond as quickly as possible when you see the X.

Press any key to begin.
DEBRIEF: This test is now complete. Press any key to continue.
